MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BARBARETT HENDERSON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. The Court treats this motion for summary judgment as a motion for judgment on the pleadings. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The Court grants the motion for judgment on the pleadings with ten days leave to amend, and plaintiff is to allege that it is the assignee of the credit card account. Plaintiff's evidentiary objections overruled. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
